content:
Hi,

Does someone know how to best do performance profiling of kernel Rust? I've been trying perf record/report, which seems to basically work, but unfortunately I don't get source annotations. I set CONFIG_DEBUG_INFO_DWARF_TOOLCHAIN_DEFAULT=y und do perf report -k vmlinux, but no source annotations.

Someone said to set perf config annotate.objdump=llvm-objdump but still no source. To use the setting might not be wrong, though, as objdump --disassemble --source vmlinux does not show the source, but llvm-objdump --disassemble --source vmlinux does.

Still there seems to be missing something. Is perf actually the right tool for the job or is there a better method?
I think this was working fine for my builds, just no symbol demangling. I’ll check later today.
I see the mangled symbols, yes. But no source.
I get annotated assembly, but no source. But I think that is due to vm paths not aligning with build environment paths.
If I use llvm-objdump in perf, I get source code lines in the output as well.

Looks like this:

Percent │                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   ▒
        │                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   ◆
        │     Disassembly of section .text:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 ▒
        │                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   ▒
        │     ffffffff816b7e90 <<kernel::block::mq::operations::OperationsVTable<rnull::NullBlkDevice>>::queue_rq_callback>:                                                                                                                                                                                                ▒
        │     ;     unsafe extern "C" fn queue_rq_callback(                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 ▒
        │       endbr64                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     ▒
        │       pushq    %rbp                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               ▒
 100.00 │       movq     %rsp,%rbp                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          ▒
        │       pushq    %r15                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               ▒
        │       pushq    %r14                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               ▒
        │       pushq    %r13                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               ▒
        │       pushq    %r12                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               ▒
        │       pushq    %rbx                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               ▒
        │       subq     $104,%rsp                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          ▒
        │     ;             unsafe { URef::from_raw(NonNull::<Request<T>>::new_unchecked((*bd).rq.cast())) };                                                                                                                                                                                                               ▒
        │       movq     (%rsi),%r15                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ▒
        │     ;         let queue_data = unsafe { (*(*hctx).queue).queuedata };                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             ▒
        │       movq     184(%rdi),%rax                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     ▒
        │       movq     (%rax),%r12                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ▒
        │     ;         unsafe { bindings::blk_mq_start_request(self.0.get()) };                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            ▒
        │       movq     %r15,%rdi                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          ▒
        │ 25: → callq    blk_mq_start_request                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               ▒
        │     ;         if queue_data.memory_backed {                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       ▒
